# **Hello!**

Thank you for checking out this page!

This is a bunch of **Quilt mods** that I compressed into one modpack!

Includes some performance, graphics and quality-of-life mods, as well as some other small utilities and tweaks!

[Click here](https://gist.github.com/flannpud/895ebc40dfa433fd1d0810249ea32361) to view the mod list (as well as the Minecraft versions they're available for).

## News

And alas, the final version (for now) of Toastities has been released.
No, this isn't an April Fools joke.

FUN FACT: This is the only version that I have tested myself. lol

```IF SOMETHING IS WRONG WITH TOASTILITIES 11 PLEASE CONTACT ME```

Use this form to send issues and feedback! [Click here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1s7qu4l2yNXtWKzv6VaUtInnk7ZGblob5mnauHq02hXs) to report a bug or suggest something or clock on the [Issues] button.
